title: astragalus stenophyllus
intro: Astragalus stenophyllus, also known as Chinese milk vetch, is a perennial legume native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, immunomodulatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus stenophyllus include enhanced immune function, improved cardiovascular health, and reduced stress levels. Astragalus stenophyllus is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and its herbal extracts have been used to support overall well-being and prevent age-related diseases.
